case_title: PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. NORCAL TREE CARE INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF BRIAN S. HEALY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT NORCAL TREE CARE INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC BELL DIRECTORY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORCAL TREE CARE INC. $32,468.42 PRINCIPAL, $3,778.25 INTEREST, $384.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,630.67, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-02-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
